summary: Repaired the shared NGINX edge publication path by forcing every service-specific edge replay to load the canonical platform topology before rendering hostnames and expanding the shared certificate SAN set, then replayed the edge live to restore `wiki.example.com` and `draw.example.com`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_edge_publication_playbooks.py tests/test_outline_playbook.py tests/test_n8n_playbook.py tests/test_dozzle_playbook.py` passed with `6 passed in 0.17s`.

`ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False uvx --from ansible-core ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/outline.yml --syntax-check -e env=production` and the matching Excalidraw syntax check both completed successfully.

`HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed with `nginx-lv3 ok=66 changed=5 failed=0 skipped=9`, including the SAN expansion task for the shared Let's Encrypt certificate.

`curl -I https://wiki.example.com` and `curl -I https://wiki.example.com/_health` both returned `HTTP/2 200`, and the live certificate SANs now include `DNS:draw.example.com` and `DNS:wiki.example.com`.

`python3 scripts/sync_docs_to_outline.py verify --repo-root /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/wiki-edge-cert-fix --base-url https://wiki.example.com --api-token-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/outline/api-token.txt` returned `outline living collections verified`.

notes: The first branch-local replay attempt failed before the edge role ran because the new worktree did not have the controller-local Hetzner token path resolved correctly; the successful replay used the absolute controller-local token path.

A clean worktree also needed `make generate-changelog-portal docs` before edge publication, because the shared edge role republishes the generated `changelog-portal` and `docs-portal` directories alongside proxy hostnames.

This branch-local receipt captures the emergency repair path; it should be superseded by a merged-main receipt once the same repair is replayed from `origin/main` and the protected integration files are updated.
